/usr/bin/ar qc libengine.a CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine/src/core/gl_system.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine/src/input/input.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine/src/graphics/renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine/src/graphics/shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/engine/src/graphics/stb_image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/glad/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_draw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_tables.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/imgui/imgui_widgets.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o CMakeFiles/engine.dir/vendor/imgui/backends/imgui_impl_opengl3.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libengine.a
